feature.name: Hook specification validation and discovery
feature.description: Extract pluggy hook specification declaration, validation, and pending-hook checks as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: declare hook specifications with HookspecMarker including firstresult and historic flags
reject hook implementations with unknown arguments during registration
reject hookwrapper implementations that are not generator functions
reject historic hookwrapper combinations via PluginValidationError
check_pending raises for unknown non-optional hook implementations
support optionalhook implementations for undeclared hooks
replay historic hook calls for plugins registered after the first dispatch
excluded_behaviors: pytest integration and setuptools entry point loading

entanglement.description: Hook specification validation is coupled to plugin registration state, historic replay buffers, and caller ordering metadata.
signals: plugin manager registry and hook caller specs
historic hook replay on late plugin registration

output.import: from featurelifted import PluginManager, HookspecMarker, HookimplMarker, PluginValidationError
